name: Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove ends from the green beans. Leave them whole or cut crosswise into 1-inch pieces.
2. Place the beans in a pot of salted water (1/2 teaspoon salt to 1 cup water). Bring to a boil and cook uncovered for 5 minutes.
3. Cover and cook until tender, 5 to 10 minutes longer. Drain the beans and turn them into a warm bowl. Set aside.
4. Cook and stir shallots, tomato, and mushrooms in margarine and oil over medium heat until the mushrooms are tender, about 4 minutes.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Add the vegetable mixture to the beans and toss.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 63; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 6g; PRO: 2g; SOD: 245mg; FAT: 4g
